sections.subtitle: Along the Ancient Tea & Horse Road
sections.text: Embark on an immersive journey to Wenhai Sanctuary, a hidden gem along the historic Tea & Horse Road. Explore pristine wetlands with a local conservationist, discovering unique alpine birds and flowers. Immerse yourself in Naxi culture with a village visit and local lunch. Hike to the magnificent Tiger Cave for breathtaking views.

items.title: What's Special
items.subtitle: Cultural Immersion
items.highlight: Naxi culture and UNESCO heritage villages

items.title: Tibetan Buddhist Temple
items.subtitle: Fuguo Tibetan Buddhist Temple
items.text: Discover the peaceful ambiance of Fuguo Tibetan Buddhist Temple, a serene sanctuary offering a genuine spiritual experience. Explore the temple grounds, admire traditional architecture, and immerse yourself in the tranquil atmosphere away from everyday bustle.

items.title: Wetland Exploration
items.subtitle: Wenhai Wetland Nature Reserve
items.text: Explore the pristine Wenhai Wetland Nature Reserve alongside a knowledgeable local conservationist. Learn about the delicate alpine wetland ecosystem, observe unique birds and flowers native to this environment, and gain insights into conservation efforts.

items.title: Naxi Village Culture
items.subtitle: Wenhai Village
items.text: Experience the warm hospitality of the Naxi people with a visit to Wenhai village. Enjoy a delicious and authentic local lunch at a traditional fish farm, savoring regional flavors and learning about Naxi culture and sustainable practices directly from the community.

items.title: Alpine Biodiversity
items.subtitle: Alpine Biodiversity
items.text: Immerse yourself in the vibrant biodiversity of Wenhai Wetland, observing unique birds and flowers that thrive in this alpine ecosystem. Discover their specialized adaptations and appreciate the delicate balance of nature in this pristine setting.

items.title: Tiger Cave Trek
items.subtitle: Tiger Cave
items.text: Embark on an invigorating hike through lush forests to the magnificent Tiger Cave. From this stunning vantage point, enjoy panoramic views overlooking Wenhai Lake and the charming village below, capturing breathtaking scenery.

items.title: Baisha UNESCO Village
items.subtitle: Baisha Village
items.text: Discover the rich history and cultural significance of Baisha Village, a designated UNESCO Heritage site. Explore the ancient village, admire its traditional architecture, and delve into its fascinating past and enduring legacy.

activities: Begin your journey at Fuguo Tibetan Buddhist Temple for a serene morning exploring the temple grounds and admiring traditional architecture.
Journey to Wenhai Wetland Nature Reserve with a local conservationist, learning about the delicate alpine wetland ecosystem and observing unique birds and flowers.
Enjoy an authentic local lunch at Wenhai village fish farm, experiencing Naxi hospitality and sustainable practices firsthand.
Trek through lush forests to Tiger Cave, enjoying panoramic views over Wenhai Lake and the surrounding village landscapes.
Explore Baisha Village, a designated UNESCO Heritage site, and discover its ancient architecture and fascinating history.
Return to Lijiang as the sun sets, carrying memories of Yunnan's rich natural beauty and cultural tapestry.

contactNote.text: For groups of 1 person or more than 6 people

included.text: English-Speaking Coordinator/Guide (Lynne Lyu or Lukasz Madrzynski), Local Ranger Guide, Entrance Tickets to Nature Reserve, Traditional Local Lunch, Private Transportation, Outdoor Travel Insurance.
included.notIncluded: Personal Expenses (Souvenirs, Snacks, etc.), Voluntary Gratuities for the Coordinators/Guides
included.meetingPoint: Pickup: 9:00 AM at your Lijiang hotel | Return: Approximately 8:00 PM to your Lijiang hotel

sections.subtitle: Click on a question to reveal the answer

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: We recommend comfortable hiking shoes, layers for changing temperatures, sun protection, a water bottle, binoculars for birdwatching, and your camera. Detailed packing list provided upon booking.

items.question: Is this suitable for children?
items.answer: Yes! This tour is family-friendly. Children under 12 should be accompanied by an adult. The moderate hiking distance (7-8 km/day) is achievable for most fitness levels.

items.question: What's the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund if cancelled 7+ days before the tour. 50% refund for 3-6 days. No refund within 48 hours. Weather contingencies always have alternatives.

items.question: What happens if it rains?
items.answer: Most activities continue in light rain. For safety during heavy storms, we'll adjust the itinerary to focus on cultural experiences and temple visits.

items.question: Are there any physical requirements?
items.answer: Basic fitness is recommended. You'll hike up to 8 km per day on mountain trails. The terrain varies but is generally moderate at altitude (up to 3,250m).

items.question: How do I get to the meeting point?
items.answer: We provide pickup from any hotel in Lijiang Old Town area. If you're staying outside this area, please contact us to arrange an alternative meeting point.

items.question: What language do the guides speak?
items.answer: Our guides are fluent in English. For other languages, please inquire about availability.

items.question: How does this trip support conservation and sustainable development?
items.answer: Each booking directly supports local conservation efforts and community development. We partner with Wenhai Wetland Conservation, employ local Naxi guides and community hosts, and contribute to environmental protection initiatives.

seo.metaTitle: Wenhai Sanctuary Ecotour | Tea & Horse Road Adventure
seo.metaDescription: Escape to Wenhai Sanctuary in Lijiang, Yunnan: Ecotour along the ancient Tea & Horse Road. Explore pristine wetlands, Naxi culture, hike to Tiger Cave, and discover UNESCO's Baisha Village. Book your Yunnan eco-cultural adventure!
